name: Grundy County Speedway
tips: Great bleacher seating on the main straightaway. Arrive early for pit passes. Concessions available on-site.

name: Golden Sands Speedway
tips: Bring blankets for cooler evenings. Excellent views from Turn 1-2. Family-friendly atmosphere.

name: Slinger Speedway
tips: High-banked quarter-mile oval — fast action! Best seats are in the upper grandstands. Beer garden available.

name: Tomah Speedway
tips: Small-town racing atmosphere. Affordable gate prices. Pit area is close to the stands.

name: La Crosse Speedway
tips: Located at the fairgrounds. Plenty of parking. Covered grandstand seating available.

name: Dells Raceway Park
tips: Great family destination — combine with a Dells vacation! Compact track means close racing. Bring lawn chairs for infield viewing.
